POST /graphql route, PgGraphQl::execute() with graphql.resolve(), bearer extraction, BackendError::Internal variant added
async-graphql 7 dynamic schema; SubscriptionField per RLS table; 4 new unit tests; wired into StateManager::do_compile(); async-graphql-axum staged in fdb-gateway for p3-c004
FabricChangeSource: tonic channel, Keto HTTP check (fail-closed), OQ-FRF-1 stub (empty stream until WatchEntityType RPC lands); frf_op_to_domain mapping; full security invariants documented
GET /graphql WebSocket upgrade via GraphQLWebSocket; reads hot-swappable subscription_schema per connection; 503 when schema unavailable; combined with POST on same route

IntrospectionMerger in fdb-app::graphql::introspection; is_introspection_query() heuristic; SDL-based type extraction; pg_graphql wins dedup; subscriptionType pointer set; wired into handle_graphql_query() via is_introspection check + conditional merge; 6 unit tests pass

KetoSyncTask in fdb-gateway/src/keto_sync.rs; privileged pool (no SET LOCAL ROLE); polls flint_meta.keto_tuples every 30s (KETO_SYNC_INTERVAL_SECS override); fail-closed cache (stale on error, never empty); PII-safe spans (subject_id excluded); cache_check() ready for FabricChangeSource integration post OQ-Iggy; spawned in main() with _keto_sync_handle; 6 unit tests pass
